criticalNote: Hotel Sorrento (5–15 Hotham Road) and InterContinental Sorrento / The Continental (23 Constitution Hill Road) are COMPLETELY SEPARATE PROPERTIES with different ownership, different addresses, and different brand positioning. Never conflate in any content.

glamping.label: Tier 3 — Glamping / Unique Stays
properties: Peninsula Hot Springs Glamping & Eco Lodges

properties.name: Jackalope Hotel
properties.michelinNote: Among first Australian properties to receive MICHELIN Two Keys designation (2025)
properties.spaNote: Infrared sauna + in-room deep-soak Japanese bath (Vineyard Bath and Lair rooms)
properties.views: Vineyard views all rooms; Merricks North hinterland

properties.name: Lancemore Lindenderry Red Hill
properties.address: 142 Arthurs Seat Road, Red Hill VIC
dining: The Dining Room (AGFG 2 hats; dinner Thu–Sat + lunch Fri–Sun)
properties.views: Vineyard views; lake views; tall silver birch trees
properties.notes: Recognised by Luxury Travel Magazine as one of Australia's most romantic regional hotels.

properties.name: InterContinental Sorrento Mornington Peninsula
properties.criticalNote: SEPARATE from Hotel Sorrento (hotelsorrento.com.au) at 5–15 Hotham Rd. Different building, different ownership.
properties.poolNote: Heated outdoor Bay-view pool with cabanas
properties.spaNote: Aurora Spa & Bathhouse — bathing pools + thermal experiences + treatments
properties.views: Port Phillip Bay (clifftop); Sorrento foreshore and township
properties.heritage: 150-year history (opened 1875 as The Continental — 'The Conti'); $100M+ redevelopment

properties.name: RACV Cape Schanck Resort
properties.views: Ocean views; golf course views; Cape Schanck coastal setting
properties.notes: Championship golf course on-site. Largest resort on Peninsula. RACV member benefits. Cape Schanck lighthouse adjacent.

properties.name: Hotel Sorrento
properties.criticalNote: SEPARATE from InterContinental Sorrento (23 Constitution Hill Rd). Heritage pub hotel — different property entirely.
properties.renovationNote: Five-year renovation completed January 2026 (confirmed Facebook/Concrete Playground)
dining: Shi Hui Shi (basement Cantonese restaurant — post-renovation dining concept)
properties.views: Port Phillip Bay clifftop views; Sorrento township 2-min walk

properties.name: Flinders Hotel (Quarters)
dining: Flinders Hotel pub bistro (adjacent — modern bistro, seafood, pub classics)
properties.views: Hinterland/coastal village views; Flinders village setting
properties.notes: 40 architecturally designed rooms. Curated MP wine minibar. Walking distance to Flinders art galleries + coastal walks. Near Foxeys Hangout and Pt. Leo Estate.

properties.name: Alba Sanctuary
properties.nameAlso: The Sanctuary at Alba Thermal Springs & Spa
properties.poolNote: Access to 15 hot spring pools on site
properties.spaNote: 22 treatment rooms (couples, mud bath, sauna, steam, hammam, hydrotherapy)
properties.views: Sweeping Peninsula views; hilltop; native bushland
properties.notes: 5-min drive from Peninsula Hot Springs. Slippers and robes included. Complimentary minibar. Champagne menu.
needsVerify: pool count clarification (15 bathing pools for accommodation guests; 22 spa treatment rooms — not the same)

properties.name: Peninsula Hot Springs Glamping & Eco Lodges
properties.poolNote: Access to all geothermal hot spring bathing pools
dining: Café on-site; healthy buffet breakfast included for guests
properties.views: Garden view / lake view / secluded (by tent style)
properties.priceRange: NOT PUBLISHED — do not include pricing; check website
properties.notes: 10 glamping tents: geothermal floor heating; ensuite; split system; king bed; walk-in robe; mini bar; private deck. 3 eco lodges (higher luxury tier). 90 min from Melbourne. Australia's first natural hot springs.

properties.name: Polperro Villas
properties.address: 150 Red Hill Road, Red Hill (villas); 64 Donaldsons Road, Red Hill (farmhouse)
properties.poolNote: In-room spa bath in all villas; Villa 4 has private sauna
properties.notes: Continental breakfast in villa on arrival. Open fireplace in all villas. Private deck. Keypad entry. Formerly Kudos Villas.

properties.name: Crittenden Lakeside Villas
properties.poolNote: Spa bath in villas confirmed; villas are built over the vineyard lake
properties.views: Lake views; vineyard views; Dromana hinterland
properties.notes: Three newly refurbished villas built entirely over the vineyard lake. Fully self-contained kitchen.

properties.name: Port Phillip Estate Accommodation
properties.address: 263 Red Hill Road, Red Hill South
properties.views: Vineyard + Port Phillip Bay panoramic views
properties.notes: 6 luxury suites on winery estate. Architectural landmark. Freshly squeezed OJ breakfast.

properties.name: Iluka Retreat & Camp
properties.poolNote: Pool mentioned in Australian Traveller — verify
properties.notes: 15-hectare property. Canvas bell tents; queen bed + optional single add-ons. Obstacle course Challenge Valley. Marine + land tours. Near Red Hill South wineries and Ashcombe Maze.

properties.name: Yurt Hideaway
properties.notes: 800m walk to Capel Sound beach. 1hr from Melbourne. Described as 'romantic feel'.

properties.name: Portsea Hotel
dining: Portsea Hotel restaurant + al fresco dining with bay views
properties.views: Port Phillip Bay panoramic views; Portsea beach
properties.notes: European nautical décor. Large al fresco dining. 10-min drive to Portsea Back Beach. Some rooms have shared bathrooms — flag in content. Noise from pub live music in some rooms.

properties.name: Arthurs Views
properties.roomsNote: Flinders Penthouse + 2 spa suites + Bowen suite
properties.poolNote: Spa bath in spa suite rooms
properties.views: Spectacular Port Phillip Bay views + city skyline from balcony; Arthurs Seat summit
properties.notes: Adults-only orientation. Arthurs Seat Forest location.

properties.name: Plantation House at Whitecliffs
properties.notes: 300m from Rye Beach. Caribbean/Bahama theme. Hot tub. Family rooms available. 4.8★ TripAdvisor.

properties.name: Peppers Moonah Links Resort
dining: Pebbles Restaurant (locally sourced produce + regional wines)
properties.views: Golf course (18th fairway Legends Course); sand dunes; Moonah trees
properties.notes: Two 18-hole championship golf courses (Open + Legends — home of 2005 Australian Open). Complimentary shuttle to Peninsula Hot Springs. All rooms have balconies/patios.

properties.name: Portsea Village Resort
properties.poolNote: Indoor heated mineral pool + outdoor heated pool + sauna
properties.notes: 1–3 bedroom contemporary apartments. Fully equipped kitchen. Tennis court. Short stroll to Portsea beach.

properties.name: Sorrento Beach Motel
properties.notes: Note: name includes 'beach' but is not beachfront — 2-min drive to bay/ocean beaches. 10-min stroll to Sorrento village. Luxury King Spa Suite available.
